news.t: EXCHANGE TRADED CONCEPTS, LLC. ANNOUNCES COMPLETION OF FUND REORGANIZATIONS

holdings.infoBox: SSPY is an equity ETF with a total of 507 individual holdings. The top holdings are Synchrony Financial stock at 1.10%, International Business Machines at 1.06%, Capital One Financial at 0.98%, Microsoft at 0.94%, and Humana at 0.87%.

overview.description: The Stratified LargeCap Index ETF (SSPY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Syntax Stratified LargeCap index. The fund tracks an index that holds all constituents of the S&P 500 Index, reweighted to diversify related business risk. SSPY was launched on Jan 4, 2019 and is issued by Stratified.

data.title: EXCHANGE TRADED CONCEPTS, LLC. ANNOUNCES COMPLETION OF FUND REORGANIZATIONS
data.text: OKLAHOMA CITY , Sept. 30, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Exchange Traded Concepts, LLC ("ETC") and Syntax Advisors, LLC are pleased to announce the completion of the reorganizations (each a "Reorganization" and...
